# Generated Docs

Files in this directory are generated by the Repo Memory CLI.

**Do not edit these files manually.** Changes will be overwritten on the next
`npx repo-memory generate` run.

## Files

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| `feature-registry.md` | All tracked features, their status, priority, and readiness. |
| `next-work-queue.md` | Ranked list of actionable features for the next agent or maintainer. |
| `doc-health.md` | Summary of documentation freshness, feature counts, and validation issues. |

## Regenerate

```bash
npx repo-memory generate
```

To preview what would be written without making changes:

```bash
npx repo-memory generate --dry-run
```
